user.title: Configure Cardinal
user.description: Map your Home Assistant sensors to Cardinal's energy concepts. Leave any field blank if you don't have that sensor.

data_description.battery_power: For inverters with a single sensor: positive = charging, negative = discharging. Use this OR the separate charge/discharge fields below, not both.
data_description.battery_charge_power: For inverters with separate charge and discharge sensors.
data_description.battery_discharge_power: For inverters with separate charge and discharge sensors.
data_description.grid_power: For inverters with a single sensor: positive = importing, negative = exporting. Use this OR the separate import/export fields below, not both.
data_description.grid_import_power: For inverters with separate import and export sensors.
data_description.grid_export_power: For inverters with separate import and export sensors.
data_description.import_rate: Current electricity import price per kWh.
data_description.export_rate: Current electricity export price per kWh.
data_description.currency: ISO currency code, e.g. GBP, EUR, USD.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Cardinal
reconfigure.description: Update your sensor mappings. Current values are shown as defaults.

abort.reconfigure_successful: Cardinal has been reconfigured and is reloading.
